stories.title: Create your identity
stories.intro: Register a WebAuthn passkey — no password, ever. Your OpenApe ID becomes the DDISA authority for your identity: every Service Provider logs you in via DNS-discovered SSO without ever seeing a credential.

steps.title: Open OpenApe ID
steps.caption: The landing page asks for nothing but your email. Click **Create account** to start.

steps.title: Request your registration link
steps.caption: Enter your email — OpenApe ID sends you a one-time registration link.

steps.title: Register your passkey
steps.caption: The link opens the passkey ceremony. Your device (Touch ID, Windows Hello, a security key) creates the credential — in this E2E run a virtual authenticator answers headlessly.

steps.title: Done — you are signed in
steps.caption: That's the whole sign-up: one passkey, no password to remember or leak.

stories.title: Your account — one page per thing
stories.intro: The dashboard is home base for your identity. Every button opens a focused page that shows exactly what it names — passkeys, SSH keys, connected services, delegations — rather than one long settings dump.

steps.title: Your dashboard
steps.caption: Signed in, the root page is your hub: **Passkeys**, **SSH-Keys**, **Agents**, **Berechtigungen**, **Delegationen** and **Verbundene Dienste** — each its own button leading to its own page.

steps.title: Passkeys — just your passkeys
steps.caption: **Passkeys verwalten** opens *only* your passkeys — add a device, remove an old one. Nothing else on the page.

steps.title: SSH keys — just your keys
steps.caption: **SSH-Keys verwalten** is only your SSH public keys for *Sign in with SSH Key* — paste one, remove one.

steps.title: Connected services — just your consents
steps.caption: **Verbundene Dienste** lists the apps you approved at sign-in. Revoke one and it asks for consent again next time. (Your **Delegationen** — apps acting for you at *another* service — get their own page too.)

stories.title: Your agent identities
stories.intro: Agents are first-class identities under your account: the IdP mints them a DDISA email and you stay in control.

steps.title: Open Agents at your IdP
steps.caption: Every agent spawned from your nests appears here with its own `…@id.openape.ai` identity — inspect it, or revoke it independently of your own keys.
